name: labs_assets
query:
SELECT 
    a.asset_id,
    a.name,
    a.room,
    a.type,
    a.building_id,
    (
        SELECT b.building_name
        FROM labs_building b
        WHERE b.building_id = a.building_id
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS building_name,             
    a.has_model,
    max(
        case 
            when (last_metrics.value >= al.warning or last_metrics.value >= al.critical) then 1 
            else 0 
        end
    ) as is_alert,
    jsonb_object_agg(coalesce(s.type, 'unknown'), value order by value asc) as metrics,
    jsonb_object_agg(coalesce(s.type , 'unknown'), s.sensor_id order by value asc) as sensor_ids,
    max(
        case 
            when last_metrics.value >= al.critical then 2
            when last_metrics.value >= al.warning then 1
            else 0
        end
    ) as alert_level,
    max(last_metrics.timestamp) as last_metric_date,
    sum(case when last_metrics.value >= al.critical then 1 else 0 end) as critical_alerts,
    sum(
        case 
            when last_metrics.value >= al.warning 
             and last_metrics.value < al.critical 
                then 1 
            else 0 
        end
    ) as warning_alerts
FROM 
    labs_sensors s
INNER JOIN 
    labs_assets a 
        ON s.asset_id = a.asset_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT 
        timestamp, value, sensor_id
    FROM 
        labs_metrics m
    WHERE 
        s.sensor_id = m.sensor_id
    ORDER BY 
        timestamp DESC
    LIMIT 1
) last_metrics ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN 
    labs_alerts al 
        ON al.sensor_id = last_metrics.sensor_id 
GROUP BY 
    a.asset_id, 
    a.name, 
    a.room, 
    a.type, 
    a.building_id, 
    a.has_model;
